parameters: Apparently there's something called POKÃ©RUS that
Yes, it's like a virus, so it's called POKÃ©RUS.
It multiplies fast and infects other POKÃ©MON too. But
It doesn't seem to do anything, and it goes away over
I guess it's nothing to worry about. Bye!
(This is another example of how to use Call Scene
Script for event calls. You can find it in every POKÃ©
Learn how to use your POKÃ©GEAR!
You see? My name is shown in a window on top of the screen. This call script is used for special npcs calls, like MOM or the PROFESSOR.
Use it in an event with pbMessageCallingIn(caller) before the dialogue, where 'caller' is the name of the npc which is calling you. At the end of the call, you must
include pbMessageCallEnd to close the phone after the dialogue.
A very interesting detail, isn't it?
Oh, btw, I triggered this event using a self switch controller from a different map, because I'm at the RADIO TOWER. As I cannot use pbSetSelfSwitch because I'm
not on the same map, I should use pbSetSelfSwitch2(arguments), where arguments are the following: map ID, event ID, "letter of the Self Switch", true/false, if you
are turning it ON or OFF.
That's all! I hope you find this useful, bye!
